objective: Continue the Orin NX EIS-workload device-stage optimization path with bounded A/B tests that preserve quality semantics: Remap pad/crop stream-only reuse, five-Regular stream-only safety extension, Remap NvBuffer-wrapper diagnostic A/B, and a small activity check only if a candidate remains healthy.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.quality_anchor: resid_r15_s07 remains the accepted Regular-gate stabilization-strength anchor.
entry_context.previous_lifecycle_result: EGLImage stream-only reuse improved same-source Regular05 wall mean by about 5.303% and stage running avg by about 6.346% while still recreating image wrappers per frame.
entry_context.previous_remap_result: Native 640x360 main chain can use a 640x368 VPI Remap scratch stage and crop/transform back before NVENC; identity and wave_safe both rc=0 and readable.
entry_context.current_question: Can the safe lifecycle/dataflow ideas already validated on PerspectiveWarp also produce small, measurable, quality-preserving or diagnostic gains on Remap pad/crop and across the Regular gate?
entry_context.claim_boundary: This loop is about device-stage lifecycle/dataflow A/B evidence. It does not claim product real-time EIS, zero-copy, Remap EIS quality improvement, or all-scene stabilization.

frozen_variables: No change to resid_r15_s07 quality semantics
Regular gate quality claims remain separate from diagnostic Remap operator claims
Accepted C++ main chain remains MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 -> pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI stage -> block-linear NV12 -> NVENC
Remap native-size diagnostics keep encoder-facing main chain at 640x360 and pad only VPI scratch to 640x368
Stream-only reuse means reuse VPI stream only; image wrappers are still recreated per frame

result.decision: Remap NvBuffer wrapper is viable and gives a small diagnostic stage-average gain; Remap stream-only reuse is healthy but slower; PerspectiveWarp stream-only remains healthy across five Regular clips.

identity.decision: healthy but slower than EGLImage baseline

wave_safe.decision: healthy but slower than EGLImage baseline

regular_stream_only_extension.regular01_boundary: metric-conditional due to gray black-border p95=0.010199653; this matches earlier dark-edge sensitivity patterns and requires human interpretation before treating it as visual regression

activity_check.boundary: activity evidence only; no FPS/W claim

result.claim_boundary: Device-stage lifecycle/dataflow evidence only. No zero-copy, no full real-time EIS, no Remap EIS quality improvement, and no queue-depth/double-buffering claim.

task_queue.title: Contract and baseline registration
task_queue.objective: Register this loop, run harness checks, and freeze the source/matrix/boundary set before device work.
success_criteria: onboard points to this active contract while running
doctor passes
Running main-gate claim remains forbidden
baseline Remap pad/crop and accepted stream-only evidence paths are identified

task_queue.title: Remap pad/crop stream-only A/B
task_queue.objective: Port the safe stream-only reuse pattern to Remap pad/crop and compare against the existing Remap pad/crop baseline.
success_criteria: identity stream-only returns rc=0
wave_safe stream-only returns rc=0
outputs are readable
black-border p95 remains 0 or is classified
stage timing is summarized
claim remains diagnostic operator/dataflow only
stop_reasons: stream-only Remap tears, fails, or creates unreadable output after one focused fix

task_queue.title: Five-Regular stream-only safety extension
task_queue.objective: Extend the already accepted PerspectiveWarp stream-only lifecycle optimization beyond Regular05 to all five Regular clips under frozen quality semantics.
success_criteria: all attempted Regular clips return rc=0
fallback remains 0 when matrix logs are available
outputs are readable
black-border does not show a large regression
result is classified as gate-wide safety evidence or failure boundary
stop_reasons: source/matrix pairs are unavailable for more than one Regular clip

task_queue.title: Remap NvBuffer-wrapper diagnostic A/B
task_queue.objective: Test whether Remap pad/crop can use VPI_IMAGE_BUFFER_NVBUFFER wrappers on format-matched pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch buffers.
success_criteria: sample compiles or compile failure is classified
identity returns rc=0 if compile succeeds
wave_safe returns rc=0 if identity succeeds
stage timing is recorded
output readability and black-border are checked
stop_reasons: VPI Remap rejects NVBUFFER wrapper payload or image format after one focused local fix
route requires broad MMAPI rewrite before a minimal verifier

task_queue.title: Bounded activity check
task_queue.objective: Run a small tegrastats/activity check only for the healthiest candidate from P1-P3.
success_criteria: activity log exists
wall/stage metrics are recorded
no FPS/W claim is made without reliable power data

task_queue.title: Evidence and docs closeout
task_queue.objective: Write concise measured results, evidence paths, and claim boundaries.
success_criteria: report records only measured data
final benchmark/hardware boundary/evidence map are updated if result is useful
long-term context records high-signal result only
results and review videos remain untracked

task_queue.title: Knowledge recovery if blocked
task_queue.objective: If a technical roadblock remains, inspect local knowledge and public/official references before stopping with an internal-AI prompt.
success_criteria: blocker is stated plainly
local attempts are listed
internal-AI prompt is produced only if the technical road decision remains unresolved

task_queue.title: Final validation and commit
task_queue.objective: Run harness, JSON, diff, secret, and artifact checks, then commit a coherent source/config/docs scope.
success_criteria: JSON parses
doctor passes
git diff --check passes
large artifacts and secrets remain untracked
oral template remains unstaged
commit message trailer policy is followed

forbidden_claims: queue-depth or double-buffering proven useful unless directly measured
stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or device access is unavailable and cannot be recovered locally
required source/matrix evidence is missing and no valid substitute exists
VPI Remap NVBUFFER route is rejected by API/format support after focused local fixes
